# Optikal Bahari - Full Documentation

> Optikal Bahari is a trusted optical center in Kemayoran, Central Jakarta, providing comprehensive eye care services, high-quality eyewear, and ethical payment solutions.

This document contains the complete informational content of the Optikal Bahari website, intended to provide LLMs and AI agents with deep context regarding our services, products, business ethics, and contact details.

## Table of Contents
1. [Overview](#1-overview)
2. [Core Services](#2-core-services)
3. [Products & Eyewear Solutions](#3-products--eyewear-solutions)
4. [Ethical Business Practices & Guarantees](#4-ethical-business-practices--guarantees)
5. [Location & Contact Information](#5-location--contact-information)
6. [About Us](#6-about-us)

---

## 1. Overview

Optikal Bahari operates under the mission **"Melayani Segala Kebutuhan Kacamata Anda"** (Serving All Your Eyewear Needs). We are a fully licensed optical clinic and eyewear retailer located in Kemayoran, Central Jakarta. We combine professional optometry with ethical, Sharia-compliant retail practices to deliver the best optical experience for our community.

## 2. Core Services

We provide accessible, professional eye care with a focus on precision and preventative health.

### Comprehensive Eye Examinations (Periksa Mata Gratis)
We offer professional, zero-cost vision testing to all visitors.
- **Refraction Checks:** Accurate determination of prescriptions for myopia (nearsightedness), hyperopia (farsightedness), astigmatism, and presbyopia.
- **Consultation:** Expert advice on the most suitable lens technologies and frame shapes based on the customer's visual needs, facial structure, and daily activities.

### Glasses Maintenance (Service Kacamata Gratis)
We believe in extending the life of your eyewear. Our free maintenance services include:
- **Frame Adjustments:** Realigning bent or loose frames for an optimal, comfortable fit.
- **Ultrasonic Cleaning:** Deep cleaning of lenses and frame crevices to remove dirt and oils safely.
- **Minor Repairs:** Nose-pad replacements, screw tightening, and nylon string replacements for half-rim frames.

## 3. Products & Eyewear Solutions

Optikal Bahari offers a curated catalog of frames and optical lenses designed for modern visual demands, with base packages starting at highly accessible price points (starting around Rp 100.000).

### Frame Collections
We stock a wide variety of designs to suit all ages and stylistic preferences:
- **Styles:** Trendy, classic, minimalist, and retro designs.
- **Materials:** Durable plastics, lightweight metals, and flexible titanium frames.
- **Brands:** A curated selection of reliable local and global frame brands.

### Lens Upgrades & Customizations
We offer premium lens technologies to protect vision and enhance comfort:
- **Standard Anti-Radiation Lenses:** Essential daily protection against UV rays and minor glare.
- **Blueray (Blue Light Blocking) Lenses:** Specifically engineered for digital device users. These lenses filter out harmful blue light emitted by screens, reducing digital eye strain, headaches, and sleep disruption.
- **Photochromic / Bluechromic Lenses:** Adaptive lenses that transition to a dark tint when exposed to UV sunlight outdoors, acting as sunglasses, and return to clear indoors. "Bluechromic" variants combine this transition technology with blue-light blocking features.
- **Progressive & Bifocal Lenses:** Seamless, multi-focal solutions designed for presbyopia. Our progressive lenses offer a smooth transition between reading, intermediate, and distance viewing without the visible line found in traditional bifocals.

## 4. Ethical Business Practices & Guarantees

A core differentiator of Optikal Bahari is our strict commitment to customer protection, transparent pricing, and ethical financial practices.

### Official Health Certification (Izin Dinkes/Kemenkes)
Optikal Bahari is fully licensed and officially recognized by the Ministry of Health (Kementerian Kesehatan) and the local Health Agency (Dinas Kesehatan). This guarantees that our clinical practices, hygiene standards, and optical dispensing meet strict government healthcare regulations.

### Comprehensive Product Warranty (Garansi)
Every complete pair of glasses purchased at Optikal Bahari is backed by a reliable warranty. This covers unexpected manufacturing defects in frames or lenses, ensuring complete customer peace of mind.

### Sharia-Compliant Installments (Cicilan 0%)
We understand that premium eyewear is an investment. To make it accessible, we offer flexible payment plans that align with ethical and Islamic financial principles:
- **Aman Riba (Usury-Free):** Strictly 0% interest on all installments.
- **Tanpa Denda (No Late Fees):** We do not penalize customers with late fees, ensuring a fair, transparent, and stress-free purchasing experience.

## 5. Location & Contact Information

We are easily accessible in the heart of Kemayoran.

- **Store Name:** Optikal Bahari (Bahari Optical)
- **Address:** Jl. Bendungan Jago No. 447, Kemayoran, Jakarta Pusat, Daerah Khusus Ibukota Jakarta, Indonesia.
- **Operating Hours:** Open Daily (Monday to Sunday) from 09:00 to 21:00 WIB.
- **WhatsApp / Phone:** 0819-3223-5445
- **Website:** [https://www.optikalbahari.com](https://www.optikalbahari.com)
- **Navigation:** Easily searchable on Google Maps and Waze as "Bahari Optical".

## 6. About Us

At Optikal Bahari, our priority is community health. We established this optical center to bridge the gap between high-quality eye care and affordability. By offering free clinical-grade eye exams, transparent pricing, and highly ethical payment options, we aim to eliminate the barriers that prevent people from achieving optimal vision. We are more than just a retail storefront; we are a dedicated healthcare partner for your eyes.
